events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the decay test rose from 383 to 4167 microns in 10 minutes (~378 microns/min, non-leveling) — far too steep for moisture off-gassing, indicating a gross leak, most likely a defective braze joint from the recent work. Result: **fail**, high risk, `installed-defective`, with corrective actions to nitrogen leak-check, repair the joint, re-evacuate, and retest before charging.
